    <h1 {...{
      "id": "brand-concierge-style-guide-ios"
    }}>{`Brand Concierge Style Guide (iOS)`}</h1>
    <p>{`This document provides a reference for styling properties supported by the AEPBrandConcierge framework. Themes are configured using JSON files that follow a web-compatible CSS variable format.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`The theme configuration is loaded from a JSON file using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeThemeLoader.load(from:in:)`}</inlineCode>{`. The framework supports CSS-like variable names (prefixed with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`--`}</inlineCode>{`) that are mapped to native Swift properties.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "loading-a-theme"
    }}>{`Loading a Theme`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`// Load from app bundle
let theme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(from: "theme-default", in: .main)

// Use default theme
let defaultTheme = ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-a-theme"
    }}>{`Applying a Theme`}</h3>
    <p>{`Apply the theme using the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.conciergeTheme()`}</inlineCode>{` view modifier on your wrapped content:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`import SwiftUI
import AEPBrandConcierge

struct ContentView: View {
    @State private var theme: ConciergeTheme = ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
    
    var body: some View {
        Concierge.wrap(
            // Your app content here
            Text("Hello, World!"),
            surfaces: ["my-surface"]
        )
        .conciergeTheme(theme)  // Apply theme to the wrapper
        .onAppear {
            // Load custom theme from JSON file
            if let loadedTheme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(from: "my-theme", in: .main) {
                theme = loadedTheme
            }
        }
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Important:`}</strong>{` The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.conciergeTheme()`}</inlineCode>{` modifier must be applied to the result of `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Concierge.wrap()`}</inlineCode>{` so the theme is available to both the wrapper and the chat overlay.`}</p>

    "input": {
      "enableVoiceInput": true,
      "disableMultiline": false,
      "showAiChatIcon": null,
      "sendButtonStyle": "default",
      "silenceThreshold": 0.02,

    "productCard": {
      "cardStyle": "productDetail"

    "welcomeCard": {
      "closeButtonAlignment": "end",
      "promptFullWidth": true,
      "promptMaxLines": 3,
      "contentAlignment": "top"
    },
    "feedback": {
      "displayMode": "modal",
      "thumbsPlacement": "inline"
    },
    "citations": {
      "showLinkIcon": false
    },
    "privacyNotice": {
